phase_0.boundary_condition: The Stone itself, which contains the entire operational framework

VINIT.chosen_element: The primal matter in its undifferentiated state
VINIT.justification: Represents the void or initial condition before any transformation begins

TANCH.chosen_element: The universal principle which anchors all transformations
TANCH.justification: The terminal anchor that contains and constrains the entire system of alchemical operations

AFWD.chosen_element: The ascending phase of the transformation, moving towards perfection
AFWD.justification: Forward morphism representing the upward movement towards the ultimate state of the Stone

AREV.chosen_element: The descending phase of the transformation, moving from perfection back to base
AREV.justification: Reverse morphism representing the descent or purification phase in the work

CLINK.chosen_element: The linking or connection between different phases of the transformation
CLINK.justification: Composition operator that connects the forward and reverse paths to form a logical chain

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: The inscription or recording of the transformation process itself
IMSCRIB.justification: Identity operator that represents self-recognition or the reflection of the process onto itself

FSPLIT.chosen_element: The separation of the unified matter into distinct components
FSPLIT.justification: Co-multiplication that splits the original substance into two or more distinct paths

FFUSE.chosen_element: The fusion or reconstitution of the separated components back into a unified whole
FFUSE.justification: Multiplication that reunites the split components into a single, perfected state

EVALT.chosen_element: The positive evaluation, indicating successful progression
EVALT.justification: Affirmative branch that confirms the transformation has proceeded correctly

EVALF.chosen_element: The negative evaluation, indicating a failed or reversed progression
EVALF.justification: Negative branch that flags a deviation from the correct path

ENGAGR.chosen_element: The paradigmatic state where both success and failure are held simultaneously
ENGAGR.justification: A paradice where the system can be both progressing and regressing in a non-resolved state

IFIX.chosen_element: The fixed point of permanence and irreversible change
IFIX.justification: ROM fixation representing the final, immutable state of the Stone

phase_3.void_description: The primordial state of undifferentiated matter before any operation
phase_3.true_description: The successful transformation to the white or perfected state
phase_3.false_description: The failed or reverted state that indicates incorrect execution
phase_3.both_description: The state of simultaneous transformation and regression, held without resolution

steps.domain_action: The primal matter exists in a void state before any operation is initiated
The universal principle binds and contains all transformations within its limits
The process initiates an upward movement toward perfection
The system descends back to the base state for purification
The forward and reverse paths connect to form a complete cycle
The process is reflected upon itself, ensuring self-awareness
The original substance is split into its component parts for processing
The system evaluates that the splitting has occurred correctly
The components are reconstituted into the perfected Stone
The system holds both the success and potential failure simultaneously
The process evaluates if any failure occurred during the split or fusion
The Stone reaches its fixed, immutable state of perfection

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The internal logic that translates the alchemical intention into operational steps
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The communication between the different elements and phases of the process
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The retention of the sequence of transformations and their outcomes
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The timing mechanism that governs when each phase of the transformation occurs
phase_5.alfs_store: The codex of the secret knowledge that serves as the canonical reference for all operations

phase_6.cycle_cost: The energy required to maintain the transformation cycle through proper temperature control
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: A system in the base state with raw material and energy input
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The system in the final perfected state of the Stone with no further transformations
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The cycle is entropy-conservative because the overall transformation process maintains the same amount of energy while achieving a higher state of order and perfection

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → TANCH → AFWD → AREV → CLINK → IMSCRIB → FSPLIT → EVALT → FFUSE → ENGAGR → EVALF → IFIX
-- Class: ob3ect_sequence
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=12
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(6, 8)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑡  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑼 → 𐑾  | terminal object — connectivity boundary
--   [2] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑡 → 𐑗  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [3] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑾 → 𐑱  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [4] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑗 → 𐑠  | composition — regime coherence
--   [5] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑱 → 𐑚  | identity — self-imscription
--   [6] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [7] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [8] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑳  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [9] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑙 → 𐑖  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [10] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑳 → 𐑭  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [11] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑖 → 𐑼  | irreversible fixation — winding number

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def ob3ect_sequence_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑡)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The primal matter exists in a void state before any operation is initiated)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [1] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The universal principle binds and contains all transformations within its limits)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑡 𐑗)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The process initiates an upward movement toward perfection)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑾 𐑱)  -- [3] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (The system descends back to the base state for purification)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑗 𐑠)  -- [4] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The forward and reverse paths connect to form a complete cycle)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑱 𐑚)  -- [5] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The process is reflected upon itself, ensuring self-awareness)
  -- FSPLIT [6] (gran := 𐑚) (The original substance is split into its component parts for processing) / FFUSE [8] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The system evaluates that the splitting has occurred correctly)
      -- F-branch (0 nodes)
      (.refl 𐑙))  -- F-branch: empty arc (direct to FFUSE.F)
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [8]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [8] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The components are reconstituted into the perfected Stone)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑙 𐑖)  -- [9] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The system holds both the success and potential failure simultaneously)
  (.arrow 𐑖 𐑳 𐑭)  -- [10] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The process evaluates if any failure occurred during the split or fusion)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑖 𐑼)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The Stone reaches its fixed, immutable state of perfection)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def ob3ect_sequence_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  (ob3ect_sequence_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def ob3ect_sequence_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  (ob3ect_sequence_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem ob3ect_sequence_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
